questions.question: Differentiate between imperative and declarative programming with examples.
keyPoints: Imperative focuses on HOW (e.g., C, Java loops)
Declarative focuses on WHAT (e.g., SQL queries, HTML)

questions.question: Explain polymorphism with a real-world example.
keyPoints: Same interface for different data types

questions.question: Compare functional and object-oriented programming paradigms. Discuss scenarios where each excels.
keyPoints: FP for data pipelines, OOP for GUI systems

questions.question: Discuss the importance of multi-paradigm programming in modern software development with examples.
keyPoints: Combine OOP for structure + FP for data processing
Example: Python using classes and list comprehensions
